description_long: This is an Adidas Teamgeist football, predominantly white with black and gold accent curves forming a unique, modern panel design. The surface is smooth and glossy, with the Adidas logo, 'SEMI FINAL', and the names 'GERMANY' and 'ITALY' clearly printed on one side, indicating its use in a high-profile match. The opposite side features the 'TEAMGEIST' branding and a FIFA Approved mark, further emphasizing its official status. The ball's panels are seamlessly fused, with no visible stitching, giving it a sleek, high-quality appearance. The overall shape is perfectly spherical, and the surface finish reflects light, highlighting its premium synthetic material. This football is designed for professional play and would be commonly found in urban parks, sports fields, or recreational areas.
description: A glossy, white Adidas Teamgeist football with black and gold curved accents, official match branding, and a seamless, modern panel design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Adidas logo, 'SEMI FINAL', and match details between Germany and Italy, with prominent black and gold curved accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the abstract, curved black and gold panel design, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'TEAMGEIST' logo and FIFA Approved mark, with the same black and gold panel accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, focusing on the abstract panel design without any text or logos.
